text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听《Real Easy English》，这是一档用简单英语进行真实对话、帮助大家学习英语的播客节目。

text: I'm Neil.
zh: 我是尼尔。

text: And I'm Beth.
zh: 我是贝丝。

text: You can find a video version of this podcast and a worksheet to help you learn on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上找到本播客的视频版和学习用的练习题。

text: How are you today, Beth?
zh: 贝丝，你今天怎么样？

text: I'm okay, Neil.
zh: 我还好，尼尔。

text: I'm a little bit tired.
zh: 就是有点累。

text: How are you?
zh: 你呢？

text: I'm very well.
zh: 我很好。

text: I'm fine.
zh: 我没事。

text: Great.
zh: 太好了。

text: Good, good.
zh: 挺好，挺好。

text: Well, today we're going to talk about mistakes.
zh: 好，今天我们要聊聊“错误”这个话题。

text: So hopefully I won't make many mistakes being tired.
zh: 希望我虽然累，但也不会犯太多错误。

text: No. Mistakes.
zh: 是啊。说到mistake，

text: can be things that are wrong, like a mistake in a maths problem,
zh: 它可以指错的东西，比如数学题里出错，

text: but we can also use mistake to talk about really big things in life, decisions that you've made, actions that you've taken.
zh: 但我们也可以用mistake来指人生中很重大的事情，比如你做的决定、采取的行动。

text: Yes, that's true.
zh: 对，没错。

text: So I think let's start the conversation.
zh: 那我们开始聊吧。

text: Let's do it.
zh: 来吧。

text: So Beth, have you made any mistakes recently?
zh: 贝丝，你最近有犯什么错误吗？

text: Yes.
zh: 有。

text: So I recently left my suitcase on a train by mistake.
zh: 我最近就不小心把行李箱落在火车上了。

text: Oh no.
zh: 哦不。

text: So I was traveling from home to Leeds
zh: 当时我从家坐火车去利兹，

text: on the train and I got to the station at Leeds and there were loads of people and they were they were football fans and they were singing really loudly and I just wanted to get off
zh: 到利兹站的时候人特别多，都是球迷，他们唱歌唱得特别大声，我就只想赶紧下车，

text: the train and that's what I did and then I realized about half an hour later that I didn't have my suitcase oh no so that's a bad mistake
zh: 于是我就下车了，结果大概半小时后我才发现行李箱没拿。哦不，这真是个大错误。

text: did you get it back I did I was so lucky the train stopped at Leeds so when I realized I ran and said to to the people on the platform,
zh: 你找回来了吗？找回来了，我很幸运，火车正好停在利兹站，我一发现就跑去跟站台上的人说，

text: my suitcase is on the train, and they held the train for me, and I ran up the platform, I grabbed my suitcase, and then they blew the whistle, and the train went, I was so lucky.
zh: 我的行李箱还在车上，他们就帮我拦下了火车，我跑上站台，抓起行李箱，然后他们吹了哨子，火车就开走了，我真是太幸运了。

text: But yeah, that was a big mistake, and I will not make that mistake again.
zh: 不过，那确实是个大错误，我以后再也不会这样了。

text: Everybody says that.
zh: 大家都这么说。

text: So earlier we said that mistakes can be small things, like my suitcase,
zh: 我们之前说过，错误可以是小事，比如我的行李箱，

text: case but there are big mistakes that we can make so have you ever made a a big mistake do you think yeah well once um i had a job
zh: 但也有一些大错误。你觉得你犯过什么大错误吗？嗯，有一次，我有一份

text: that i really enjoyed i was teaching at a school in prague in the czech republic teaching english and i loved the job and i had loads of really good friends but i had this feeling
zh: 我很喜欢的工作，我当时在捷克布拉格的一所学校教英语，我很喜欢那份工作，也交了很多好朋友，但我有一种感觉，

text: that i needed to go move somewhere else do something else with my life and so I resigned but then about a week or so later
zh: 觉得自己需要换个地方生活，做点别的事情，于是我就辞职了。可是大概一周后，

text: I realized I really didn't want to leave that school so I went back to the boss and I said I've changed my mind I
zh: 我意识到我其实并不想离开那所学校，于是我回去找老板，说我改主意了，

text: want to stay and he said well it's too late because I've given your job to somebody else oh no that's so sad so you left your job left Left Prague?
zh: 我想留下来，可他说太晚了，我已经把你的职位给别人了。哦不，太可惜了。那你就离职了？离开布拉格了？

text: No, actually, a bit like your suitcase, Beth.
zh: 不，其实啊，贝丝，有点像你的行李箱一样，

text: It ended up being okay because the person who took my job then decided that he didn't want the job either.
zh: 最后结果还不错，因为接手我职位的人后来也决定不想要那份工作了。

text: So in the end, I did stay.
zh: 所以最后我还是留下来了。

text: So when we make mistakes, Neil, sometimes we then have a regret or we regret the thing that we did.
zh: 尼尔，我们犯错误之后，有时候会产生一种“遗憾”的感觉。

text: that means that we feel bad about it or we wish that we'd done something differently.
zh: 意思是我们会因为这件事感到难过，或者希望当初做得不一样。

text: Do you have any regrets?
zh: 你有什么遗憾吗？

text: Yeah, when I was a kid, I guess I was probably 12 or 13,
zh: 有，我小时候，大概十二三岁的时候，

text: I had some piano lessons and I quit as soon as I could.
zh: 上过一段时间钢琴课，一有机会就放弃了。

text: My parents gave me that choice and I regret that because I love music and I play guitar and I think I would have enjoyed playing piano.
zh: 我父母当时让我自己选择，我现在挺后悔的，因为我喜欢音乐，也弹吉他，我觉得我应该也会喜欢弹钢琴的。

text: I always think, to be honest, you shouldn't have any regrets because whatever you've done, you've learned something from it.
zh: 老实说，我总觉得人不应该有遗憾，因为不管你做过什么，你都从中学到了东西。

text: Even if something bad happened, then you know for next time and it's a kind of self -improvement thing.
zh: 就算发生了不好的事情，你也能吸取教训，这其实是一种自我提升。

text: That is a very positive attitude to mistakes, Beth.
zh: 贝丝，这真是一种很积极的心态。

text: Yeah, I think it's important to learn from your mistakes.
zh: 是啊，我觉得从错误中学习很重要。

text: And that's a common expression in English, to learn from your mistakes.
zh: 这在英语里也是一个常见的表达，叫“learn from your mistakes”。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we've learned in this podcast, starting with mistake.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这期节目学到的词汇，先从mistake开始。

text: And a mistake is an action that is wrong or that you do when you don't mean to.
zh: mistake指的是做错的事情，或者不是故意做的事。

text: And we can make a mistake – that means we do something wrong.
zh: 我们可以说make a mistake，意思是做错了某件事。

text: Or we can do something by mistake, which means we do something accidentally, without meaning to.
zh: 也可以说do something by mistake，意思是无意中做了某事，不是故意的。

text: For example, I left my suitcase on the train by mistake.
zh: 比如说：我不小心把行李箱落在火车上了（I left my suitcase on the train by mistake）。

text: We also heard regret, which means feel bad or sorry about something you've done or a mistake that you've made.
zh: 我们还提到了regret，意思是对自己做过的事情或犯的错误感到难过或后悔。

text: And we heard learn from your mistakes, which means remember the mistake and then not do it again the next time.
zh: 我们还听到了learn from your mistakes，意思是记住这个错误，下次不再犯。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 本期《Real Easy English》就到这里。

text: You can test yourself on what you've learned with a worksheet on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上用练习题来检验自己学到的内容。

text: See you then.
zh: 到时候见。

text: Goodbye.
zh: 再见。

text: Bye.
zh: 拜拜。
